data.body: PASS-2 verification complete (read-only). Confirmed: bindings.json is committed by reconcile.py::_commit_binding_store_snapshot (L237, L1197-1213), NOT by _advisory_lock.py (which writes only .reconciler-pass-lock/.reconciler-phase-gate, L61-62). bindings.json lives under a .bridge_state/ subdir (binding_store.py:77), not the branch root. Union-merge + merge=ours handling is in _store/sync.py:19-20,88-108, not push.py (push.py only does the .bridge_state/* stash/merge dance, L158-180). Additional on-disk consumers: _engine_support/resolver.py:50 and binding_store.py:77,80,110 (recovery hint).
